title: Melon / Pumpkin Farm
description: A semi-automatic melon or pumpkin farm using observers and pistons. Melon/pumpkin stems grow from seeds on farmland; when the fruit block grows adjacent to the stem an observer detects the block update and fires a piston that breaks the fruit. Drops are collected in a water stream leading to hoppers and a chest. Each stem needs one adjacent dirt/farmland tile for the fruit to spawn. Pistons face the fruit position; observers face the stem. Requires light level 9+ and hoed farmland.
